title: Fugitive Lovers
writer: Albert Hackett, Frances Goodrich, George B. Seitz
actors: Robert Montgomery, Madge Evans, Ted Healy
plot: Hoping to evade gangster Legs Caffey, chorus girl Letty Morris hops a bus in New York bound for Los Angeles--with Legs close on her heels. Along the way the bus picks up escaped convict Paul Porter, who quickly allies himself with...
